articles.title: Monero’s Riccardo Spagni Arrested on Fraud Charges
articles.description: Riccardo Spagni, a prominent figure in the Monero cryptocurrency community, has been arrested on fraud charges. Details surrounding the allegations and the circumstances of his arrest remain under investigation, raising concerns within the crypto community about the potential impact on the Monero project.

articles.title: Cardano Primed To Follow Litecoin’s 2018 Price Trajectory, According to Veteran Trader Peter Brandt
articles.description: Veteran analyst and trader Peter Brandt is issuing a warning to Cardano holders, saying that the fifth-largest cryptocurrency could be on the brink of following Litecoin’s 2018 price trajectory. The popular crypto strategist tells his 549,300 Twitter followers that Cardano could be at the top of the price range and facing a potential downtrend, similar […]

articles.title: Monero’s former maintainer arrested in the US for allegations unrelated to cryptocurrency
articles.description: An arrest warrant for Riccardo Spagni was issued on July 20, 2021, at the request of the South African government. He was apprehended the same day in the United States.

articles.title: Eden to Protect Sushi Traders from MEV on Ethereum
articles.description: Eden is launching a new initiative aimed at safeguarding sushi traders from Miner Extractable Value (MEV) on the Ethereum network. This move seeks to enhance the trading experience and protect users from potential exploitation by miners who can manipulate transaction orders for their benefit.

articles.title: IOTA's Tangle Chosen as Platform for Revolutionary Smart Energy Project
articles.description: Tangle, a data structure of the IOTA DLT, is going to empower smart energy sensor ecosystem SUSEE

articles.title: Bitcoin Likely to Hit New All-Time Highs in the Near Future, Key Metrics Say: CryptoQuant
articles.description: According to a recent analytics report, Bitcoin may well reach new all-time highs in the near future

articles.title: Tether CTO Denies USDT Issuance Stopped for Two Consecutive Months
articles.description: Tether CTO Paolo Ardoino said that USDT is still seeing issuance, with $100 million of the stablecoin being issued recently.

articles.title: 182.3 million XRP Sent to Jed McCaleb, While Ripple Unlocks Another Billion XRP
articles.description: Ripple has withdrawn another billion XRP and sent 182-million XRP portion to its former CTO
